title: lathyrus luteus var. laevigatus
intro: Lathyrus luteus var. laevigatus, also known as the smooth yellow pea or smooth pea, is a variety of the Lathyrus luteus plant, which belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus luteus var. laevigatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and crushing the plant to make a powder for use in capsules or as a topical application.
